rationale: Pinned 2b4fb8f09eff6e008b5887c1a765c3339874c880 in an absolute /tmp clone. Finding A is resolved: the dated spec addendum explicitly supersedes every stale discharge/re-tally requirement and accurately matches shipped code, ADR-0037, and consolidated-round-3.md: a self-contained marker is reconciled to panel_refuted from metadata on every path, with no panel re-read or discharge. The plan amendment is now spec-wide. Finding B is real but is correctly non-blocking for 114: FinalizeEpic's raw-bd-close auto-merge is a pre-existing, different-verb bypass outside R1/R2's explicit mindspec complete scope; the scope note is honest, and P1 mindspec-o4fd tracks lifecycle-wide hardening. Shipping 114 improves the scoped authoritative gate without claiming to close that follow-up. Round-2 has no Go delta. go build ./..., empty gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal, and focused panel/complete/bead/cmd tests all passed.

findings.detail: The spec and plan addenda unambiguously supersede the deleted discharge design and match the shipped satisfy-from-marker implementation and ADR.

FinalizeEpic can auto-merge raw-bd-close bead branches without the complete gate. This remains a real P1 follow-up, but is outside spec 114's explicitly complete-scoped contract and is candidly disclosed rather than over-claimed.
